hero.description: Self-taught front-end developer and UI designer from Sudan. I started learning programming during the war while my dental studies were paused. Today I build websites, digital products, and startup ideas for real clients and businesses.

about.title: About Me
about.badge: From Dental School to Digital Products
about.intro: Hey, I'm Mohammed Moniem — a former dental student who found a new path through technology during one of the hardest periods in Sudan. What started as curiosity became a full transition into front-end development, UI design, and digital product building. I design and develop modern websites, create user-focused experiences, and help businesses move beyond just social media into real digital presence.

terminal.line1: I didn't enter tech through the traditional path.
terminal.line2: I was studying dentistry when war disrupted everything. Instead of waiting for life to restart, I started learning programming, design, branding, and digital systems through self-study.
terminal.line3: Today I build websites, digital products, startup concepts, and online experiences for clients and organizations.
terminal.line4: From nonprofit platforms to business websites and startup systems, I focus on creating products that are visually clean, technically solid, and genuinely useful.
terminal.line5: Beyond coding, I use content creation and storytelling to inspire Sudanese youth to explore technology, freelancing, and digital opportunities.

about.spinning: MOHAMMED MONIEM • WEB DEVELOPER • UI DESIGNER •

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey through design leadership and innovation

emojidesign.desc1: Worked on branding, web development, and digital experiences for businesses and organizations. Managed social media content and helped clients establish stronger digital presence.
emojidesign.desc2: Delivered modern, responsive websites and digital products combining clean design with solid technical implementation.

gezira.desc1: Conducted digital literacy workshops and supported refugee data collection operations using KOBO tools in collaboration with humanitarian initiatives.
gezira.desc2: Provided technical support and training to help communities access digital resources and improve data management systems.

tiktok.desc1: Built an audience sharing content about web development, career transition, and self-learning during the Sudan war. Reached thousands of followers through educational and motivational tech content.
tiktok.desc2: Created programming tutorials, career advice, and motivational content to inspire Sudanese youth to explore technology and digital opportunities.
